name: El Bori CR INC
description_short: El Bori CR INC is a credit repair provider based in San Antonio, Texas. Rated 5.0/5 with 365 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
El Bori CR INC is a San Antonio-based credit repair firm operating under the El Bori Credit Repair brand. The company serves Texas consumers looking to address damaged credit profiles, positioning itself at the intersection of dispute-based credit repair and broader financial consulting. With a dedicated website and an established local presence, the firm appears to work with individuals dealing with collections, late payments, charge-offs, and other derogatory items that are dragging down their credit scores.

What distinguishes El Bori CR INC from pure dispute-filing services is its dual listing as both a credit counseling service and a financial consultant — suggesting a more holistic engagement than simply sending letters to the bureaus. This approach, if delivered consistently, can produce more durable results: clients who understand why their credit was damaged are better positioned to avoid repeating the same mistakes. The firm has accumulated 365 Google reviews at a 5.0 rating, which is a notably high review volume for an independent local credit repair operation and implies an active, repeat-referral client base rather than a thin set of testimonials.

Before engaging El Bori CR INC or any credit repair company, consumers should understand the legal framework that governs the industry. Under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), no firm may charge upfront fees before services are rendered, must provide a written contract, and must disclose your right to cancel within three business days. Obtain your own credit reports from all three bureaus via AnnualCreditReport.com before your first consultation, identify which items you believe are inaccurate or outdated, and ask the firm specifically how they approach disputes — a quality provider will explain their methodology, not just promise results. No company, regardless of track record, can legally guarantee removal of accurate negative information.

El Bori CR INC's review profile is one of the strongest among independently operated credit repair firms in the San Antonio market, and the sheer volume of reviews suggests consistent service delivery over time. The financial consulting component is a genuine differentiator that could translate to better long-term outcomes. That said, pricing and service tiers do not appear to be published publicly, requiring prospective clients to make direct contact before understanding their financial commitment. As with any credit repair engagement, verify the contract terms carefully, confirm CROA compliance, and set realistic expectations — legitimate credit improvement is a process measured in months, not weeks.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Exceptional Google rating of 5.0/5 across 365 reviews — unusually high volume for an independent local firm, indicating sustained client satisfaction
Dual service model combining credit counseling and financial consulting, which may address root causes of credit damage rather than just disputing items
Local San Antonio presence enables in-person consultations, which can be important for consumers who prefer face-to-face guidance on sensitive financial matters
Established brand with a dedicated website suggests a structured business rather than an informal operation
Financial consulting designation implies staff with broader expertise beyond basic dispute letter generation
cons: Pricing and service packages are not publicly listed — prospective clients must contact the firm directly before understanding costs, making comparison shopping harder
Staff credentials and certifications (NFCC membership, FICO Pro, etc.) are not clearly surfaced in available public information and should be verified directly
As a local firm, remote or out-of-state service capabilities are not clearly documented, which may matter for clients who relocate or prefer digital-first interactions
The credit repair industry broadly carries reputational risk from bad actors; consumers must independently verify CROA compliance and contract terms regardless of review scores
No publicly visible dispute success metrics or sample timelines — clients should ask directly how long typical engagements run and what outcomes have looked like
best_for: Consumers in San Antonio, Texas looking for credit repair services
People who prefer working with a local credit repair provider
Individuals with negative items on their credit reports
People preparing for major purchases like home or car buying
diagnosis: El Bori CR INC appears best suited for San Antonio-area consumers with genuinely inaccurate or outdated negative items on their credit reports who want both dispute assistance and foundational financial guidance from a single provider. The high review volume builds credibility, but prospective clients should verify contract terms, ask about CROA compliance, and understand that even well-reviewed firms cannot guarantee removal of accurately reported information.
services: Credit report review and analysis (all three bureaus)
Dispute letter preparation and filing with Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion
Negative item removal targeting — collections, late payments, charge-offs, and judgments
Credit counseling sessions — one-on-one guidance on credit behavior and history
Financial consulting and personal budgeting support
Credit score improvement strategy and roadmap planning
Creditor negotiation and goodwill letter assistance
Identity theft dispute support and fraud alert guidance
Credit education resources and financial literacy coaching
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
